title: Now Hiring Production Engineer at Carrier India Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Production Engineer at Carrier India Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Carrier India Asia Pacific Associates is actively seeking a talented and motivated Production Engineer to join our dynamic team in Ranchi. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Carrier India Asia Pacific Associates:
Carrier India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in GD&T

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Carrier India Asia Pacific Associates!
